title: 2025 LCFS Amendment Implementation FAQ
content:
The Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ), related to the implementation of the 2024 LCFS amendments, got updated on 15th September. These FAQs revolve around the areas- CI benchmarks, credit generation, CI exceedance deficit obligation, conservation margin of safety (MOS), sustainibility requirements, online feedstock tracking platforms, and other applications of CI benchmark. One of theupdated FAQs ; How will the amended 2025 carbon intensity (CI) benchmarks apply to quarterly reporting and credit generation?
The amended 2025 carbon intensity benchmarks came into effect on July 1, 2025, and apply to fuels supplied in Q3 2025 and beyond. Benchmark values included in the LCFS regulation sections 95484(d) Table 1 for gasoline, 95484(e) Table 2 for diesel, and 95484(f) Table 3 for jet fuel will apply to credit generation calculations included in various sections, including section 95486.1 of the LCFS regulation, starting with Q3 2025 quarterly fuel transaction reports due by December 31, 2025.
author: Analysts Account
